0-2-5-8_b8.label: genuine-ambiguity
0-2-5-8_b8.note: Fm6/A笙ｭ is preferred because F-A笙ｭ-C-D forms a complete F minor-sixth chord with the minor third in the bass, a conventional inversion. Dm7笙ｭ5/A笙ｭ is the equally complete enharmonic half-diminished reading with the flat fifth in the bass, and music21, tonal, and pychord all expose that alternate. The more conventional bass role favors Fm6/A笙ｭ, but the half-diminished reinterpretation makes the ambiguity genuine.

0-2-5-7_b0.label: clearly-correct
0-2-5-7_b0.note: Csus2sus4 is correct; it is the complete root-position double-suspension template and scores clearly above the incomplete or slash alternatives. Tonal's Csus24 and pychord's Csus4add2 are semantically equivalent names for the same C-rooted structure.

0-2-5-7_b2.label: genuine-ambiguity
0-2-5-7_b2.note: Dm11 is preferred with D in the bass because D, F, C, and G supply the root, minor third, flat seventh, and eleventh of a conventional root-position minor-eleventh shell with an omitted fifth. Tonal's D-rooted first choice supports the D-root hearing but not the full minor-eleventh label. G7sus4/D and Csus2sus4/D are complete and valid slash-chord alternatives, and both surface as possible alternatives, so the ambiguity is genuine, but their roots do not align with the bass.

0-1-3-6-8-10_b0.label: genuine-ambiguity
0-1-3-6-8-10_b0.note: D笙ｭmaj13sus4/C is preferred because the voicing forms a complete D笙ｭ suspended-major thirteenth stack with C as the major seventh in the bass. Tonal's G笙ｭ6/9笙ｯ11/C names the same six-note Lydian collection from the subdominant side, while music21's A笙ｭ11/C is also structurally complete. The D笙ｭ reading is bass-role driven, but all three roots describe plausible organizations of the same quartal/Lydian material.

0-1-3-6-8-10_b1.label: genuine-ambiguity
0-1-3-6-8-10_b1.note: G笙ｭ6/9笙ｯ11/D笙ｭ is preferred because G笙ｭ-B笙ｭ-D笙ｭ-E笙ｭ-A笙ｭ-C forms a complete Lydian major-six-nine sonority with D笙ｭ as the fifth in the bass. Tonal agrees on the F笙ｯ/G笙ｭ 6/9笙ｯ11 identity, while music21's A笙ｭ11/D笙ｭ and the near-tie D笙ｭmaj13sus4 reading give complete alternatives. The G笙ｭ label is clearer as a musician-facing symbol, but the competing roots are musically real.

0-1-3-6-8-10_b3.label: genuine-ambiguity
0-1-3-6-8-10_b3.note: E笙ｭm13 is preferred because E笙ｭ-G笙ｭ-B笙ｭ-D笙ｭ forms a complete root-position minor-seventh shell, with A笙ｭ as eleventh color and C as thirteenth color. The previous G笙ｭ6/9笙ｯ11/E笙ｭ reading remains a surfaced possible alternative and tonal's primary label, but it makes E笙ｭ the sixth in the bass while the E笙ｭ reading gives the bass/root a conventional minor-thirteenth organization. Music21's A笙ｭ11/E笙ｭ is another complete re-rooting, but it creates the dominant-eleventh major-third-against-eleventh clash. The row is a genuine three-root ambiguity.

0-1-3-6-8-10_b6.label: genuine-ambiguity
0-1-3-6-8-10_b6.note: E笙ｭm13/G笙ｭ is preferred because E笙ｭ-G笙ｭ-B笙ｭ-D笙ｭ forms a complete minor-seventh shell with G笙ｭ as the minor third in the bass, plus A笙ｭ as eleventh color and C as thirteenth color. Tonal's G笙ｭ6/9笙ｯ11 remains a surfaced possible alternative and is a strong root-position Lydian-major reading, but the same pitches also support the complete E笙ｭ minor-thirteenth sonority. Music21's A笙ｭ11/G笙ｭ is a complete dominant-eleventh re-rooting with the flat seventh in the bass, but it leans on the less idiomatic major-third-against-eleventh clash. The competing complete structures make this a genuine ambiguity.

0-1-3-6-8-10_b8.label: oracle-limitation
0-1-3-6-8-10_b8.note: A笙ｭ11 is preferred because A笙ｭ is the bass/root and the voicing supplies a complete dominant-eleventh stack A笙ｭ-C-E笙ｭ-G笙ｭ-B笙ｭ-D笙ｭ. Music21 agrees. Tonal's G笙ｭ6/9笙ｯ11/A笙ｭ re-roots the same collection as Lydian major-six-nine color, but it turns the bass into the ninth; ChoCo also favors the dominant-eleventh vocabulary here, with 388 dominant7|nine,eleven observations versus 5 exact major6|sharp11,add9 observations.

0-1-3-5-6-8-10_b8.label: genuine-ambiguity
0-1-3-5-6-8-10_b8.note: A笙ｭ13 is preferred because A笙ｭ is the bass/root and the voicing supplies the complete dominant-thirteenth stack A笙ｭ-C-E笙ｭ-G笙ｭ-B笙ｭ-D笙ｭ-F. Music21 agrees semantically as G笙ｯ13. Tonal's G笙ｭmaj13笙ｯ11/A笙ｭ is a valid Lydian-major re-rooting of the same collection, and WhatChord surfaces it as a close alternate; however, it makes the bass the ninth while the A笙ｭ label keeps root-position dominant evidence. ChoCo also favors the broad dominant-thirteenth vocabulary, with 8947 dominant7|nine,eleven,thirteen observations versus 29 major7|nine,sharp11,thirteen observations.

0-1-3-6-8-10_b10.label: genuine-ambiguity
0-1-3-6-8-10_b10.note: G笙ｭ6/9笙ｯ11/B笙ｭ is preferred because B笙ｭ is the major third of the complete G笙ｭ Lydian major-six-nine sonority. Tonal lists both B笙ｭm11(no5) and F笙ｯ6/9笙ｯ11/B笙ｭ, while music21 chooses an A笙ｭ11/B笙ｭ re-rooting. The B笙ｭ bass makes the minor-eleventh view tempting, but the G笙ｭ label names all six tones as a coherent major-family color without treating G笙ｭ/F笙ｯ as an altered minor fifth.
